mapper.sql: select id, merchant_id, batch_no, card_type, bin_id, total_count, success_count, fail_count, status, remark, submit_time, complete_time, created_at, updated_at from vcc_card_issue_request where del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into vcc_card_issue_request ( merchant_id, batch_no, card_type, bin_id, total_count, success_count, fail_count, status, remark, submit_time, del_flag, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{merchantId}, #{batchNo}, #{cardType}, #{binId}, #{totalCount}, 0, 0, #{status}, #{remark}, sysdate(), '0', sysdate(), sysdate() )
mapper.update: update vcc_card_issue_request set status = #{status}, success_count = #{successCount}, fail_count = #{failCount}, complete_time = #{completeTime}, updated_at = sysdate() where id = #{id}
update vcc_card_issue_request set success_count = success_count + 1, updated_at = sysdate() where id = #{id}
update vcc_card_issue_request set fail_count = fail_count + 1, updated_at = sysdate() where id = #{id}
